# Test Fixtures

Committed test data for offline unit tests. No network or auth required.

## Delta (`delta/`)

Generated by `tests/generate_fixtures.py` using the `deltalake` Python library.

| Fixture | What It Tests |
|---------|---------------|
| `basic_table/` | Simple table with common types — baseline add actions, schema extraction |
| `partitioned_table/` | Partition columns, partitioned file paths |
| `column_mapping_v2/` | `delta.columnMapping.mode=name` — physical vs logical name resolution |
| `cdf_enabled/` | `delta.enableChangeDataFeed=true` — CDF metadata in properties |
| `unicode_paths/` | Non-ASCII characters in file paths and table name |

## Parquet (`parquet/`)

Generated by `tests/generate_fixtures.py` using `pyarrow.parquet`.

| Fixture | What It Tests |
|---------|---------------|
| `all_types.parquet` | Int, float, string, bool, date, timestamp, decimal columns |
| `nested_structs.parquet` | Struct, list, map columns — complex type introspection |
| `dictionary_encoded.parquet` | Dictionary encoding on string column |

## Regenerating

```bash
cd TUI
uv run python tests/generate_fixtures.py
```

All fixtures are deterministic — regenerating produces identical files.
Keep fixtures small (< 100 rows, < 10 KB).
